definition:
1. called together, summoned , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. ς. ἐκκλησία at Athens, an assembly specially summoned  by the στρατηγός (opposite to the ordinary meetings, αἱ κυρίαι); Decret. quoted in (Demosthenes Orator):—;generally, σύγκλητος (i.e. ἐκκλησία); a legislative body , (Aristotle Philosopher) (ML)
